results.title: PhoneDeck reviews
results.content: Every Mac controller app I've tried needs permissions or network config that breaks the first time your router restarts. Phone tied up as controller instead of free for other stuff, need somewhere to prop it. WiFi only latency matters for media controls.

results.title: PhoneDeck App Store
results.content: Stuck or something not working? DM me directly on Instagram @PhoneDeckApp
